title: Current moment
playerSummary: The crew is operating out of the Barrel & Bullet Saloon while Alkenstar's factories, gangs, and corrupt officials turn every job into a powder keg.
gmTruth: Mugland's influence is threaded through Alkenstar's money, muscle, and crooked institutions, making the city a pressure cooker for heists, investigations, reprisals, and underworld maneuvering.
